title: cattleya × elegans var. prasiata
intro: Cattleya × elegans var. prasiata, also known as the "Green Lip" or "Green Lip Orchid," is a hybrid orchid plant belonging to the Cattleya genus, characterized by its unique greenish-yellow lip and white to pale yellow sepals. The plant is used in herbal medicine, primarily for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × elegans var. prasiata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the roots, leaves, or flowers to create teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal use.
